title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: rust-coreos-installer bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for rust-coreos-installer is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: coreos-installer installs Fedora CoreOS or RHEL CoreOS to bare-metal machines (or, occasionally, to virtual machines).Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [rhel-9] Backport fix: use full path for 'root=' karg when rootfs on multipath (JIRA:RHEL-104982)  Backport fix for genprotimg changes: coreos-installer (JIRA:RHEL-93001)

full_text:
An update for rust-coreos-installer is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

coreos-installer installs Fedora CoreOS or RHEL CoreOS to bare-metal machines (or, occasionally, to virtual machines).Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [rhel-9] Backport fix: use full path for 'root=' karg when rootfs on multipath (JIRA:RHEL-104982)  Backport fix for genprotimg changes: coreos-installer (JIRA:RHEL-93001)
